title: BN14 8PB, SmithKline Beecham Limited: partial surrender issued – EPR/QP3935LE/S008
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter for:   Operator name: SmithKline Beecham Limited Installation name: Worthing Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Facility Permit number: EPR/QP3935LE/S008  "
